# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Secure Custom Build and Deploy
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Custom build script to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_command:
        description: 'Custom deployment command to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      environment:
        description: 'Target environment'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production
        default: development

jobs:
  build-deploy:
    runs-on: [self-hosted, custom-build]
    environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Validate Inputs
        id: validate
        run: |
          # Validate build script input
          if [[ ! "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}" =~ ^[a-zA-Z0-9_./-]+$ ]]; then
            echo "Invalid build script path"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          # Validate deploy command input
          if [[ ! "${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}" =~ ^[a-zA-Z0-9_./-]+$ ]]; then
            echo "Invalid deploy command"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          echo "build_script_validated=${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "deploy_command_validated=${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Setup Environment
        run: |
          # Setup secure environment
          mkdir -p /tmp/build-${{ github.run_id }}
          chmod 700 /tmp/build-${{ github.run_id }}

      - name: Execute Build Script
        run: |
          # Execute build script with restricted permissions
          cd /tmp/build-${{ github.run_id }}
          if [ -f "${{ env.build_script_validated }}" ]; then
            chmod +x "${{ env.build_script_validated }}"
            ./"${{ env.build_script_validated }}"
          else
            echo "Build script not found: ${{ env.build_script_validated }}"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Execute Deployment
        run: |
          # Execute deployment command with validation
          if [ -n "${{ env.deploy_command_validated }}" ]; then
            # Only allow specific deployment commands
            case "${{ env.deploy_command_validated }}" in
              "deploy-staging"|"deploy-production")
                echo "Executing: ${{ env.deploy_command_validated }}"
                ${{ env.deploy_command_validated }}
                ;;
              *)
                echo "Unauthorized deployment command"
                exit 1
                ;;
            esac
          else
            echo "No deployment command specified"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Cleanup
        if: always()
        run: |
          # Cleanup temporary directory
          rm -rf /tmp/build-${{ github.run_id }}
